title: Loading Tips
description: Add helpful tips, tricks, and gameplay facts to the world loading screen.
body:
✨ Loading Tips ✨

> **Loading Tips is a simple mod... Replace your boring loading screen with helpful tips!** ![A Minecraft loading screen showing a custom tip with a small icon and a progress bar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b10a02f75d80fe879e330d862788f9481a7b38a3_0.webp) ## 🛠️ How to Use: This mod is interactive! While your world is loading, you can: - **Forward/Back:** 🖱️`Scroll Up/Down` to go to the next tip or to go back to the previous one in order. - **Random Tip:** 🖱️`Left-Click` the text to jump to a completely random tip from the 500+ available. - **Copy Tip:** 🖱️`Middle-Click` the text to instantly copy the tip to your clipboard. - **Move the Text:** 🖱️`Click and Drag` the tip text to move it anywhere on your screen. The mod will remember your favorite spot! - **Reset Position:** 🖱️`Right-Click` the text to instantly snap it back to the default center position.
🔍 Frequently Asked Questions - **Where are the tips stored?** They are located inside the mod jar at `assets/custom_loading_tips/text/loading_tips.json`. - **Does it affect loading speed?** Not at all! The mod is extremely lightweight and only runs during the loading screen. - **Can I add my own tips?** Yes! you can add your own tips to the `loading_tips.json` file.
💻 Development > 🤖 The technical coding, Fabric integration, and internal logic were developed with the assistance of [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com) (Google AI) and [Claude](https://claude.ai) (Anthropic AI), built using [IntelliJ IDEA](https://www.jetbrains.com/idea/). The entire project was completed in less than a day. ![Built with Gemini](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Gemini-8E75B2?style=flat-square&logo=googlegemini&logoColor=white) ![Built with Claude](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20with-Claude-CC785C?style=flat-square&logo=anthropic&logoColor=white) ![IntelliJ IDEA](https://img.shields.io/badge/IDE-IntelliJ-000000?style=flat-square&logo=intellijidea&logoColor=white)
💡 Optional > 🧩 **[FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)** isn't required, but it's great! Use it to pause the loading screen so you can take your time reading tips or choosing the perfect location for the text.
